text:
Created attachment 155833
Upgrade Boost to 1.58

Upgrade Boost to 1.58.
The enclosed patch file upgrades following ports:
devel/boost-all
devel/boost-docs
devel/boost-jam
devel/boost-libs
devel/boost-python-libs

There is also a pull request on Github with same changes:
https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/pull/28

Regards,
Chen
